author: whiskeyjack96
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Enables an AI Agent (Lode) that uses Agent Client Protocol (ACP), to communicate directly with your notes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🔧 Bug Fix

- Fixed @codemirror/view compatibility issue with Obsidian by pinning to version 6.38.6

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/1.1.2...1.1.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🛠️ ESLint Configuration Improvements

- Fix EditorView type resolution by adding @codemirror/view dependency
- Configure ESLint to ignore unused variables prefixed with underscore
- Update sentence-case linting configuration

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/1.1.1...1.1.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎯 Bug Fixes and Code Quality Improvements

**Bug fixes and improvements**
- Updated message rendering and tool call UI components
- Simplified tool call and permission input display
- Resolved ReadableStream type incompatibility with ACP library
- Fixed all ESLint violations and improved type safety
- Addressed ESLint violations from Obsidian plugin review

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎯 Metadata-Based Triggers

**Automatic agent workflows triggered by note metadata**
- Add `acp-trigger: true` to any note's frontmatter to automatically spawn an agent session when the note is created or modified
- Customize agent behavior with `acp-prompt` field to specify what the agent should do
- Audio files (.mp3, .m4a, .wav, etc.) are automatically sent to the agent for transcription and processing, note not all ACP agents support audio
- Triggers automatically disable after activation to prevent loops, ensuring safe automated workflows

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎯 Version 1.0.0 - Major Release

**First stable 1.0.0 release** of the ACP client plugin for Obsidian, featuring comprehensive test coverage, stability improvements, and updated dependencies.

### ✨ Key Features
- **Comprehensive Test Suite**: 81.85% code coverage with 57 automated tests
- **Enhanced Context Awareness**: Backlinks integration for better note connections
- **Improved Autocomplete**: Better search functionality with @ and / triggers
- **Dotfile Support**: Access hidden files in your vault
- **Mode Selector**: Input toolbar integration with keyboard shortcuts
- **Configurable UI**: View positioning and hotkey customization

### 🧪 Testing & Stability
- 57 automated tests covering core functionality
- Lifecycle management tests for reliable connections
- Terminal operation tests for subprocess management
- Debounce and trigger management validation
- Full TypeScript type safety

### 📦 Updated Dependencies
- **Express**: 4 → 5 (latest major version)
- **Zod**: 3 → 4 (improved validation)
- **MCP SDK**: 1.0.4 → 1.23.0 (latest protocol updates)
- **TypeScript**: 4.7.4 → 5.0.0 (modern language features)
- **@types/node**: 20 → 24 (latest Node.js types)
- **Vitest**: 4.0.14 (latest testing framework)
- All ESLint packages updated to v8
- Zero vulnerabilities

### 🔧 Developer Experience
- Vitest testing framework with coverage reporting
- Improved error handling and logging
- Better type safety across codebase
- Node.js 20+ support in CI/CD

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/0.9.0...1.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🔄 Stability & UX Improvements

- **Infinite loop prevention** - Per-session write tracking prevents triggers from causing infinite loops
- **Clickable vault links** - Internal vault links in agent chat messages are now clickable
- **Better permission UX** - Hide loading dots and show notification during permission requests
- **Improved bundling** - System prompt now bundled as JS module instead of reading from filesystem

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/0.8.0...0.9.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎯 Multi-Instance Support & Enhanced Session Control

**Multi-instance conversation tracking**
- Added support for running multiple agent instances simultaneously with independent conversation tracking
- Each session maintains its own conversation history and state

**Automated vault event triggers**
- Added automated triggers that respond to vault events (file creation, modification, deletion)
- Enables the agent to react automatically to changes in your vault

**Write auto-approval toggle**
- Added pill-style toggle in session window for quick write auto-approval control
- Easily enable/disable auto-approval without navigating to settings

**Code quality improvements**
- Refactored inline styles to CSS classes for better maintainability and consistency

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/0.7.0...0.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎯 MCP Server Integration

**Add embedded MCP server for external agent integration**
- Enable AI agents to discover and execute Obsidian commands programmatically
- Configure MCP server settings directly in plugin preferences
- Secure local HTTP endpoint for agent-to-Obsidian communication

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/0.6.0...0.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎯 New Feature: @current_note Autocomplete

**Smart file reference for open notes**
- Type `@` to see a special `current_note` option that expands to show only your currently open files, with the active file marked with `*`

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WhiskeyJack96/obsidian-agent/compare/0.5.0...0.6.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Adds agent thinking, addresses plugin feedback

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixed

  - Dark mode cursor visibility - Fixed cursor being invisible in dark mode (b4cc456)

  Refactored

  This release is primarily a major refactoring with significant improvements:

  Code Organization

  - Message rendering - Extracted message rendering into dedicated classes:
    - messages/base-message.ts - Base message class
    - messages/text-message.ts - Text messages
    - messages/tool-call-message.ts - Tool call messages
    - messages/permission-request-message.ts - Permission requests
    - messages/commands-message.ts - Command messages
    - messages/debug-message.ts - Debug messages
    - messages/pending-message.ts - Pending messages
    - messages/message-renderer.ts - Message rendering coordinator
  - Mode management - Extracted mode handling into mode-manager.ts for better separation of concerns
  - Autocomplete - Extracted autocomplete functionality into autocomplete-manager.ts and fixed shell-related issues

  Type Safety

  - Eliminated any types throughout the codebase
  - Added type definitions in types.ts
  - Improved type safety for message rendering
  - General type cleanup and improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
New Features

  - Added dedicated Diff View with CodeMirror integration for reviewing file changes 
  - Added dedicated Plan View viewing agent plans 
  - Implemented UI enhancements including cancel button for stopping agent turns, loading bubble for pending
  responses, and mode selector dropdown for switching agent modes.

  Settings

  - Added Debug mode toggle for console logging and experimental Obsidian Focused Prompt option (marked as alpha feature).

  Bug Fixes

  - Fixed autocomplete functionality and corrected debug mode logging implementation.
